description_long: This forklift features a robust, boxy body with a yellow and black color scheme, supported by four large, rugged wheels with prominent treads. The front is equipped with two long, parallel steel fork arms designed for lifting and transporting pallets or heavy loads. An overhead guard made of metal bars provides protection for the operator, while the open cab area includes a simple seat and a control console. The mast is tall and sturdy, with visible rails and support structures for vertical movement of the forks. The overall design is utilitarian, emphasizing durability and functionality for industrial or urban logistics environments.
description: A yellow and black forklift with large rugged wheels, long steel fork arms, and a protective overhead guard, designed for lifting and transporting heavy loads.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the fork arms, the operator seat, and the large wheels.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the back of the forklift, the overhead guard structure, and the rear wheels.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the fork arms, operator area, and the wheels from the other side.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the fork arms, mast, and the protective overhead guard.
attribute_fork_arms: The forklift has two long, straight fork arms made of steel, positioned parallel to each other at the front. They are rectangular in cross-section, appear thick and sturdy, and extend well beyond the body of the vehicle. The arms are evenly spaced and show no visible attachments or signs of wear.
attribute_overhead_guard: The overhead guard consists of a rectangular steel frame with evenly spaced horizontal bars, providing coverage above the operator's seat. It is constructed from metal and designed to protect the operator from falling objects, with no visible padding or additional safety features.
attribute_mast: The mast is a tall, double-stage structure made of steel, with visible vertical rails and support beams. It is robust and designed to guide the fork arms during lifting, but no hydraulic components, chains, or rollers are visibly detailed.
attribute_operator_seat: The operator seat is a simple, boxy structure with a backrest, colored in a dark shade, likely black or gray. It appears to be made of plastic or fabric, with no visible armrests, headrest, seatbelt, or adjustment levers.
attribute_warning_lights: No visible warning lights are present on the forklift in any of the views.
